# Restaurant Menu Manager build script.
# Usage: make -f makefile.txt <target>
# Targets:
#   module    compile all module source files to object files
#   demo      build the demo executable
#   run       run the demo
#   test      build the test executable
#   run_test  run the tests
#   clean     remove every generated file
#   rebuild   clean and rebuild everything from scratch

CXX      = g++
CXXFLAGS = -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra

MODULE_OBJS = MenuItem.o FoodItem.o DrinkItem.o SpecialItem.o \
              SortStrategy.o Menu.o

module: $(MODULE_OBJS)

MenuItem.o: MenuItem.cpp MenuItem.h
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c MenuItem.cpp -o MenuItem.o

FoodItem.o: FoodItem.cpp MenuItem.h
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c FoodItem.cpp -o FoodItem.o

DrinkItem.o: DrinkItem.cpp MenuItem.h
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c DrinkItem.cpp -o DrinkItem.o

SpecialItem.o: SpecialItem.cpp MenuItem.h
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c SpecialItem.cpp -o SpecialItem.o

SortStrategy.o: SortStrategy.cpp SortStrategy.h MenuItem.h
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c SortStrategy.cpp -o SortStrategy.o

Menu.o: Menu.cpp Menu.h MenuItem.h SortStrategy.h
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c Menu.cpp -o Menu.o

demo: demo.o $(MODULE_OBJS)
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -o demo demo.o $(MODULE_OBJS)

demo.o: demo.cpp MenuItem.h Menu.h SortStrategy.h
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c demo.cpp -o demo.o

run: demo
	./demo

test: test_runner

test_runner: test.o $(MODULE_OBJS)
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -o test_runner test.o $(MODULE_OBJS)

test.o: test.cpp MenuItem.h Menu.h SortStrategy.h
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c test.cpp -o test.o

run_test: test
	./test_runner

clean:
	rm -f *.o demo test_runner

rebuild: clean module demo test

.PHONY: module demo run test run_test clean rebuild
